title: Lateral occupant engagement cushions
abstract: Lateral airbag cushions for preventing or inhibiting inboard occupant excursion. Some embodiments may comprise an inflatable cushion (110) configured to deploy adjacent to a vehicle seat laterally of a vehicle occupant and a tether (120) coupled with the inflatable cushion. The tether may be configured to be coupled to the vehicle seat at opposite ends and may be configured to, upon deployment, form the inflatable cushion into a pocket or other lateral engagement structure adjacent to the vehicle occupant to engage a shoulder and/or arm region of the vehicle occupant to prevent or at least inhibit inboard/lateral excursion during an impact event.
claims: Claims 1. An airbag cushion assembly for a vehicle comprising an inflatable cushion [110], characterized in that the inflatable cushion is configured to deploy adjacent to a vehicle seat laterally of a vehicle occupant and comprising a tether [120] coupled with the inflatable cushion [110], the tether [120] being configured to be coupled to the vehicle seat at opposite ends, wherein the tether [120] is configured to, upon deployment, form the inflatable cushion [110] into a pocket adjacent to the vehicle occupant to engage a shoulder and arm of the vehicle occupant. 2. The airbag cushion assembly of claim 1 , wherein the tether [120] is further configured to extend along a peripheral edge of at least a portion of the inflatable cushion [110] during deployment. 3. The airbag cushion assembly of claim 1 or 2, wherein the tether [120] extends within a tunnel [118] formed along the inflatable cushion [110] 4. The airbag cushion assembly of claim 3, wherein the tunnel [118] extends along a peripheral edge of the inflatable cushion [110] 5. The airbag cushion assembly of any of claims 1 -4, wherein, upon deployment, the inflatable cushion [110] extends from the vehicle seat a distance that varies between a top of the vehicle seat and a bottom of the vehicle seat. 6. The airbag cushion assembly of any of claims 1 -5, wherein the tether [120] is configured to be tensioned during deployment to facilitate formation of the pocket. 7. The airbag cushion assembly of any of claims 1 -6, wherein the inflatable cushion [120] is configured to deploy from the vehicle seat. 8. The airbag cushion assembly of any of claims 1 -7, wherein the inflatable cushion [1 10] comprises a primary chamber [112] and a plurality of finger chambers [114] coupled with the primary chamber [112] 9. The airbag cushion assembly of claim 8, wherein following deployment each of the plurality of finger chambers [114] extends at an at least substantially perpendicular angle from the primary chamber [112] 10. The airbag cushion assembly of claim 8 or 9, wherein the plurality of finger chambers [114] comprises: an upper set of finger chambers; a middle set of finger chambers; and a lower set of finger chambers, wherein each of the middle set of finger chambers is longer than each of the upper and lower set of finger chambers. 11. The airbag cushion assembly of any of claims 1 -10, wherein the tether [120] is variable in length following deployment. 12. The airbag cushion assembly of any of claims 1 -11 , further comprising a tether pretensioner [130] configured to fix a released length of the tether [120] during deployment. 13. The airbag cushion assembly of claim 12, wherein the tether pretensioner [130] is configured to lock the tether [120] in place upon experiencing a threshold force during deployment. 14. The airbag cushion assembly of claim 12, wherein the tether pretensioner [130] is configured to retract the tether [120] during deployment, and wherein the retraction of the tether [120] bends at least a portion of the inflatable cushion [110] to form the pocket. 15. The airbag cushion assembly of any of claims 1 -14, further comprising a lateral head support cushion [840] configured to deploy above the primary chamber [112] adjacent to and lateral of the vehicle occupantâs head.
